case_title: JENNIFER PRIEST VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-06-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-21-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
